name: Restorative Yoga (75-min)
description: 75-minute restorative class. Surrender energy throughout. Long-held supported poses, conscious rest, extended savasana. No peak — the entire class is a slow drift down. Compatible with yin formats and most studio restorative offerings.

music_pedagogy.beat: Movement is minimal. Tracks should drift rather than drive — beat clarity is less important than sustained atmosphere.
music_pedagogy.voice: Long silent stretches between cues. Tracks must allow extended quiet without abrupt shifts back to high energy.
music_pedagogy.count: Rarely used. Counts here are breath cycles, not beats.

phases.name: Settling
phases.notes: Students lie down with props. Quiet, atmospheric.

phases.name: Long-Held Poses
phases.notes: Long-held supported poses. Music continues but stays low-percussion.

phases.name: Conscious Rest
phases.notes: Deeper rest. Tracks may have very long fades or drone-like quality.

phases.name: Final Savasana
phases.notes: Extended savasana. Silence is welcome — let a track end and don't replace it for 2-5 minutes.

content_filter: Strictly filter explicit lyrics. Tracks with prominent sung lyrics should also be screened — many students sleep during restorative and lyrics can pull them back to alertness.
